title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 16 2025

summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 16/10/2025
Iron ore concentrate prices in the Tangshan area of Hebei have remained rela vely stable in recent days, with ex-factory prices for 66% grade iron oreconcentrates (dry basis, including tax) at 920-925 yuan/mt. Supply remains ght, as the local governments in Qian'an and Zunhua recently issued wri en documents regarding land use regula ons for iron ore beneficia on enterprises, leading to produc on suspensions and rec fica ons at some non-compliant enterprises, along with produc on restric ons and power ra oning. According to SMM tracking, most of the suspended enterprises are beneficia on plants with rela vely small capacity, having a limited impact on local iron ore concentrate supply.
